title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: squid bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for squid is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Squid is a high-performance proxy caching server for web clients, supporting FTP, and HTTP data objects.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): "ICAP_ERR_OTHER/408" occurs in icap.log when downloading a file on RHEL9 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131797)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
full_text:
An update for squid is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Squid is a high-performance proxy caching server for web clients, supporting FTP, and HTTP data objects.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): "ICAP_ERR_OTHER/408" occurs in icap.log when downloading a file on RHEL9 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131797)
